name: Step-2
archDisplay: Trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (first from a Chinese firm)
note: First trillion-parameter MoE LLM from a Chinese firm; previewed March 2024, officially launched July 2024 at WAIC; Step-2-16k ranked 5th globally (1st in China) on LiveBench in Nov 2024, behind only OpenAI and Google models.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: MarkTechPost (2024-11-20) independently corroborates trillion-parameter MoE architecture and 16k context for Step-2-16k, and WAIC July 2024 launch (with March 2024 preview) matches Wikipedia/search consensus. The LiveBench 57.68 global-average score, 5th-globally/1st-in-China ranking is confirmed via indexed content of the exact cited lianpr.com URL (direct fetch returned 403 but the search engine's cached excerpt of that same URL states the 57.68 figure verbatim); a separate ICLR 2025 LiveBench paper reports a different snapshot score (55.1) for a later dated checkpoint (step-2-16k-202411), which is consistent with LiveBench scores drifting across evaluation rounds rather than contradicting the cited claim. ROUND-7 EXHAUSTIVE-SEARCH RECORD (2026-07-15, methodology-diversified per native-language/regional-leaderboard instructions): No taxonomy-matching benchmark results found for StepFun Step-2 after a widened, Chinese-language-inclusive search. Checked: Chinese tech media (36Kr, QbitAI, 极客公园/GeekPark, 腾讯新闻, IT之家, 中关村在线, 知乎), Chinese leaderboards (OpenCompass/司南 rank.opencompass.org.cn, SuperCLUE superclueai.com), Artificial Analysis, LMArena/Chatbot Arena, OpenRouter (stepfun provider page), Hugging Face, and arXiv (including the Step-3 technical report for retrospective Step-2 comparisons). Wayback Machine was inaccessible in this environment (web.archive.org fetches are blocked). The only concrete, repeatedly-corroborated numeric result found across all sources is Step-2-16k scoring 86.57 on LiveBench's 'IF Average' sub-category (Nov 2024 snapshot, ranking 5th globally / 1st in China overall) — but this is already captured in the existing corpus note/verificationNotes and, critically, LiveBench is not in the allowed taxonomy slug list; its 'IF Average' sub-metric is methodologically distinct from ifeval/ifbench and mapping it there would misrepresent the source. OpenCompass coverage of Step-2 was qualitative ('best among domestic startup models') with no retrievable numeric table entry. No MMLU, C-Eval, CMMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval, MATH, GPQA, or any other taxonomy-listed benchmark score exists for Step-2 in any source reached. Step-2 was a closed, API-only, short-lived (2024, now deprecated) model marketed primarily via one third-party leaderboard rather than the standard academic benchmark suite, and it has no Hugging Face model card or dedicated technical report. This is consistent with prior research rounds' findings — recommend concluding no further public benchmark data exists for this model.
